## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? -->

## Related issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #123 -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / internal
- [ ] Docs / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all -- --check` passes
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings` passes
- [ ] `cargo test -p proxy-core` passes
- [ ] `cargo check -p copilot-proxy` passes
- [ ] Version bumped in `Cargo.toml` **and** `src-tauri/tauri.conf.json` (if releasing)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated (for user-facing changes)
- [ ] No secrets (API key / private endpoint) in the diff
